name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sirsahol
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What user problem does this solve? Who is affected? (job seeker / employer / admin)
     Write this from the user's perspective — not the technical solution. -->

**As a** [job seeker / employer / admin],
**I want** [capability],
**so that** [benefit / outcome].

---

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

---

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is this the best one? -->

---

## Is This on the Roadmap?

<!-- Check docs/roadmap.md first. If it's there, which phase? -->

- [ ] Already in roadmap (Phase: __)
- [ ] Not on roadmap — this is a new proposal

---

## Scope Estimate

<!-- How big is this? -->

- [ ] Small — a few hours (e.g. new API endpoint, small UI component)
- [ ] Medium — a few days (e.g. new Django app, new aggregation source)
- [ ] Large — a week+ (e.g. full feature like AI matching, new payment flow)
- [ ] Epic — multiple sprints (e.g. community features, full ATS upgrade)

---

## Affected Components

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Backend — Django model / API
- [ ] Frontend — Next.js page / component
- [ ] Aggregation — new job source or parser
- [ ] Payments — Paystack / plans
- [ ] Infrastructure — Docker / CI / deployment
- [ ] Documentation

---

## Mockups / References

<!-- Screenshots, wireframes, links to similar features on other platforms (e.g. Upwork, LinkedIn Jobs) -->

---

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else: related issues, external dependencies, performance considerations -->
